working_on: Phase 1.5.2 — Discovery / Planning / Engagement triad architecture: author ADR 0034; substantially rewrite docs/ui-architecture.md and docs/session-lifecycle.md against the triad; file MemPalace decision drawer.
outcome_summary: Phase 1.5.2 closed. ADR 0034 (Discovery / Planning / Engagement triad as primary product structure) lands at Status: Accepted, replacing the globe-as-home-screen + concept-engagement-surface architecture retired by ADR 0033. Three primary surfaces, one per structured-guidance problem: Discovery (dual-path — AI conversational onboarding + browseable concept catalog, both first-class), Planning (syllabus-as-plan with prerequisite gating, quiet completion markers, hard-cap-of-five preserved), Engagement (structurally inherited from ADR 0028's three bounded contexts, unchanged). Cross-domain bridge-surfacing-in-context committed as durable convention; library/bookshelf as a third primary surface foreclosed (held open for amendment without supersession on Phase 9 cold-test path). docs/ui-architecture.md and docs/session-lifecycle.md substantially rewritten; Globe Navigation Model + Level-of-Detail Rendering + Globe as Home Screen sections dropped wholesale; trophy/glow/tendril reward language stripped from Mastery Verification; atomic-unit framing, mode transitions, proficiency-as-implied-transition, routing-after-concept-completion, organic-verification framing per ADR 0013, and Concurrent Syllabus Limit (hard cap of five) all preserved. ADR count after S-0014: 34 ADRs total (33 Accepted + 1 Superseded). MemPalace decision drawer drawer_paideia_general_b0bf9b7cc2e14fe97e6fd515 filed. tools/validate.py clean (0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns). adr/README.md and CHANGELOG updated. STATE.md handoff to S-0015 (Phase 1.5.3: multi-platform Apple expansion + Phase 9 rewrite).
